seo.title: AI Glossary - Terms and Definitions | onsmartAI
seo.description: Access our complete glossary of Artificial Intelligence terms. Clear and objective definitions to better understand the world of business AI.

hero.title: AI Glossary
hero.subtitle: Essential terms and definitions
hero.description: Learn the main Artificial Intelligence concepts with clear and objective definitions.

aiAgents.definicao: Autonomous systems that can make decisions and execute specific tasks using artificial intelligence, without constant human intervention.

machineLearning.definicao: AI subfield that allows systems to learn and improve automatically through experience, without being explicitly programmed.

nlp.definicao: AI area that focuses on interaction between computers and human language, allowing machines to understand and respond in natural language.

rpa.definicao: Technology that uses software to automate routine and repetitive business tasks, mimicking human actions.

deepLearning.definicao: Machine learning subset that uses neural networks with multiple layers to analyze data similar to the human brain.

api.definicao: Application Programming Interface - set of protocols that allows communication between different software and systems.

bigData.definicao: Extremely large and complex data sets that require specialized tools for processing and analysis.

roi.definicao: Metric that measures investment efficiency, calculating the return obtained in relation to the invested value.
